Celebrate the divine bond of Raksha Bandhan with this beautifully crafted Ganesh Single Rakhi, featuring the sacred image of Lord Ganesha, the symbol of wisdom, protection, and prosperity.

🇺🇸Ships from USA🔒SSL Secure Checkout🚚5–7 Day USA Delivery✓Satisfaction Guarantee

Celebrate the divine bond of Raksha Bandhan with this beautifully crafted Ganesh Single Rakhi, featuring the sacred image of Lord Ganesha, the symbol of wisdom, protection, and prosperity.

This spiritual rakhi is a perfect way to express your love, prayers, and blessings for your brother on this special occasion.

Designed with a traditional thread and elegant detailing, this rakhi brings a devotional and festive touch to your celebrations.

Lord Ganesha is believed to remove obstacles and bring happiness, making this rakhi a meaningful and auspicious choice for your beloved brother.

Whether you are celebrating nearby or sending love across miles, this Ganesh Rakhi for Brother is a thoughtful expression of care and tradition.

Perfect for families looking to send Rakhi to USA , this designer rakhi combines spirituality with elegance to make Raksha Bandhan truly memorable.

Common questions

How long does delivery take in the USA?
UsaRakhi delivers to all 50 US states in 5–7 business days after dispatch. Orders placed before our daily cut-off ship the same day.
Can I order from India, UK, or Canada?
Yes. Enter your brother's US delivery address at checkout. We fulfill domestically inside America — no customs hassle for your brother.
Is roli and chawal included?
Most single rakhis include complimentary roli (kumkum) and chawal (rice) for the traditional Raksha Bandhan tilak ceremony.
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept Stripe (USD) and Razorpay (INR). All payments are encrypted and we never store card details.
What if my Rakhi arrives damaged?
Contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos. We offer replacements or refunds for damaged or incorrect items — see our Returns & Guarantee policy.

Send Rakhi to USA from India, UK, Canada & worldwide. Premium Rakhis delivered to all 50 US states.
